product.name: ArDigiPrint
product.specLine: 250 g/m², 100% Polyester, Flexible Fabric for Digital Printing 100% Polyester flexible fabrics for digital printing
descriptions: Can be stretched on widht and length wise.
250 g/m², 100% Polyester, Flexible Fabric for Digital Printing 100% Polyester flexible fabrics for digital printing
technicalParameters: Dimensional Change | -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1

stage1.noMatchReason: This is a flexible 100% polyester interlock fabric explicitly intended for digital/sublimation printing applications (per specLine, descriptions, and applicationImageLabels 'ArDigiPrint'/'Digital Printing Fabrics'). No explicit industry-sector use (military, firefighting, energy, welding, motorcycle, hivis, medical, sport, architecture-building, or transport) is stated in the supplied data.

primary.rationale: The fabric is explicitly and solely intended for digital/sublimation printing, matching the print-signage application which covers digital-print fabrics.

secondary.rationale: No other explicit end use, sector, or garment application is stated in the product data beyond digital printing.

alternativesConsidered.reasonNotSelected: No explicit outdoor or garment use stated; only digital printing use is given.
No furniture or interior use mentioned; stretch property alone insufficient.
